# polymarket_positions (Data Source)

Lists the open positions held by a Polymarket wallet, with cost basis and profit-and-loss for each market outcome.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "polymarket_positions" "example" {
  user  = "0x349606c1b77f3ba668879cbc9347f15a44cf8fc4"
  limit = 10
}

output "position_titles" {
  value = [for p in data.polymarket_positions.example.positions : p.title]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `user` (String) Wallet address whose positions to list (the on-chain proxy wallet, a `0x`-prefixed address). This is the only required input.

### Optional

- `limit` (Number) Maximum number of positions to return. Combine with `offset` to paginate.
- `market` (String) When set, restricts results to positions in the market with this condition ID.
- `offset` (Number) Number of positions to skip before collecting results, for pagination.

### Read-Only

- `positions` (Attributes List) Open positions held by the wallet. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--positions))

<a id="nestedatt--positions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `positions`

Read-Only:

- `asset` (String) CLOB token ID of the held outcome.
- `avg_price` (Number) Average entry price across all buys, in `[0, 1]`.
- `cash_pnl` (Number) Unrealized profit or loss in USDC (`current_value` minus `initial_value`).
- `condition_id` (String) Condition ID of the parent market.
- `cur_price` (Number) Current market price of the held outcome, in `[0, 1]`.
- `current_value` (Number) Current mark-to-market value of the position, in USDC.
- `end_date` (String) Date on which the market is scheduled to resolve.
- `event_slug` (String) Slug of the parent event.
- `initial_value` (Number) Cost basis of the position, in USDC.
- `negative_risk` (Boolean) Whether the position is in a negative-risk (multi-outcome) market.
- `opposite_outcome` (String) Name of the opposing outcome in the market.
- `outcome` (String) Name of the held outcome, e.g. `Yes` or `No`.
- `outcome_index` (Number) Zero-based index of the held outcome within the market.
- `percent_pnl` (Number) Unrealized profit or loss as a percentage of cost basis.
- `realized_pnl` (Number) Realized profit or loss already locked in, in USDC.
- `redeemable` (Boolean) Whether the position is in a resolved market and can be redeemed for USDC.
- `size` (Number) Number of shares held.
- `slug` (String) Slug of the market the position is in.
- `title` (String) Title of the market the position is in.
